corrections.note: Accent is on the wrong syllable.
The word 'ἢ' was incorrectly added. This error was found in the S-text, which was mislabeled as APPARATUS in the transcription.
The article 'τὰς' is missing. This error was found in the S-text, which was mislabeled as APPARATUS in the transcription.
The word was misread. The image has κατασπῶντες. This error was found in the S-text, which was mislabeled as APPARATUS in the transcription.

notes: The transcription has a major structural error. The page contains two recensions of Tobit: the B-text (upper block) and the S-text (lower block, marked with ℵ). The transcription correctly identifies the B-text as BODY, but it incorrectly transcribes the S-text as part of the APPARATUS. The S-text should be part of the BODY. The actual critical apparatus (at the very bottom of the page) is transcribed correctly but is appended to the S-text within the APPARATUS section. Corrections for the S-text are reported with `section: "BODY"` as that is where the text belongs.
